objective: Phase 3 #6 fork of macos.qqmusic.play_visible_row.v0. Same row-detection + row-activation flow, but the `press-result-play` step swaps debug.clickScreenText for debug.smartPress so the play control is reached via the AX path when QQ音乐 exposes it as a pressable accessibility node, falling back to a pointer click on the OCR-resolved anchor otherwise. The actual strategy each invocation took is recorded in signals (smartPress.strategy / smartPress.fallbackUsed); the recipe does not lock either outcome.

query.note: Current fallback baseline starts from the ASCII query aa.

requested_title.note: Optional user-intended title for coverage reporting when the verified playback title is different from the semantic request.

target_title.note: The expected now-playing title that must be verified through the AX tree after row activation.

preconditions: QQ音乐 is installed and can be addressed by ${app_id}.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.
The recipe runs on the live desktop, re-activates QQ音乐 before live capture steps, and still uses pointer disturbance for row activation.
The desktop is quiescent during the press-result-play step. Hands-on operator cooperation invalidates the recorded smartPress.strategy as evidence.

notes: Same disturbance envelope as v0. Row activation is still pointer-row, so the recipe budget stays pointer regardless of which path smartPress takes on press-result-play.

smartPress will record cursorDisturbance=none when the AX path wins on the play control, or cursorDisturbance=warp when the recipe falls back to a real pointer click. Both outcomes are valid; the recipe does not assert either.

Phase 3 #6 lesson: a v1 recipe that swaps clickScreenText for smartPress is a contract change, not an implementation detail. Cases stay candidate until ≥3 hands-off replays per case land successfully.

steps.purpose: Press the QQ音乐 play control via debug.smartPress. The recipe does NOT assert smartPress.strategy — that signal is data the matrix is meant to gather. If the AX path wins the play control becomes pointer-warp-free; if it falls back the behaviour is identical to v0.

expected_signals: The query is submitted through clipboard-backed search entry.
debug.waitForScreenRows reports enough visible rows in the constrained result region.
debug.clickScreenRow reports row bounds and a projected logical click point.
debug.smartPress completes for the result play control on either the AX path or the pointer-click fallback.
debug.verifyNowPlayingTitle confirms ${target_title} from the AX tree without relying on screenshot OCR.
success_criteria: A visible row is activated through row detection.
The result play control is pressed (via AX or pointer fallback).
The current now-playing title is verified through the AX tree.
non_goals: This recipe does not lock smartPress.strategy on the play control. AX-action and pointer-click fallback are both valid.
This recipe does not prove generalized playback for arbitrary queries.
This recipe does not prove OCR row anchor stability — row activation is still pointer-based.
This recipe does not prove pointer-free playback activation. Even when smartPress takes the AX path on the play control, the row click is still pointer.

known_limits.narrow_baseline: v1 is an experimental fork. Promotion to validated requires hands-off replays; one successful smoke is not enough.
known_limits.row_detection_still_pointer: Only the play control step is re-grounded on smartPress. Row activation remains debug.clickScreenRow with full pointer disturbance.
known_limits.smart_press_strategy_drift: The strategy smartPress chooses for the play control depends on whether QQ音乐 exposes the button as an AX-pressable node. That can change with the app version, the visible state of the player area, and even the size of the result region.
known_limits.shared_app_state: Do not run multiple QQ音乐 recipes against the same live app instance at once.
